---
$schema: "../../../schemas/workspace.schema.json"
version: "2.0"

# Workspace Intelligence — generated by Velocity /workspace-setup
# This file lives in: velocity-workspace/.velocity/workspace.md
# Edit it to register repositories and configure shared context propagation.

workspace:
  name: "{{WORKSPACE_NAME}}"
  description: "{{WORKSPACE_DESCRIPTION}}"
  architecture_style: "{{ARCHITECTURE_STYLE}}"
  shared_patterns:
    - "{{PATTERN_1}}"
    # - event_driven
    # - ddd
    # - cqrs
  domains:
    - "{{DOMAIN_1}}"
    # - payments
    # - customer
    # - orders

repositories:
  - id: "{{REPO_1_ID}}"
    name: "{{REPO_1_NAME}}"
    url: "{{REPO_1_URL}}"
    description: "{{REPO_1_DESCRIPTION}}"
    primary_domain: "{{REPO_1_DOMAIN}}"
    type: service
    bounded_contexts:
      - "{{REPO_1_CONTEXT_ID}}"
    sync: on_pull
    adapters:
      - cursor

  # Register additional repositories below:
  # - id: payments-service
  #   name: Payments Service
  #   url: git@github.com:org/payments-service.git
  #   description: Payment processing and settlement
  #   primary_domain: payments
  #   type: service
  #   bounded_contexts:
  #     - payments
  #   sync: on_pull
  #   adapters:
  #     - cursor

context_map:
  contexts:
    - id: "{{REPO_1_CONTEXT_ID}}"
      name: "{{REPO_1_CONTEXT_NAME}}"
      repository: "{{REPO_1_ID}}"
      path: CONTEXT.md
      description: "{{REPO_1_CONTEXT_DESCRIPTION}}"

    # Add shared bounded contexts from other repositories below:
    # - id: payments
    #   name: Payments
    #   repository: payments-service
    #   path: CONTEXT.md
    #   description: Payment processing and settlement
    # - id: customer
    #   name: Customer
    #   repository: customer-service
    #   path: CONTEXT.md
    #   description: Customer profiles and account management

shared:
  guardrails: guardrails/workspace.md
  knowledge_base: knowledge-base/
  project_context:
    engineering: project-context/engineering.md
    security: project-context/security.md
    testing: project-context/testing.md
    api: project-context/api.md

sync_config:
  auto_propagate_contexts: true
  auto_propagate_guardrails: true
  require_approval_before_propagation: false
  # downstream_webhook_secret: VELOCITY_WEBHOOK_SECRET

generated_at: "{{GENERATED_AT}}"
---
